meta.title: Dale Peterson Interviewed By Bosch CyberCompare
meta.description:
The tables are turned in this week's Unsolicited Response episode. Dr. Jannis Stemmann and Simeon Mussler of Bosch CyberCompare interviewed me (audio only) for a long form German interview/article. 

The interview starts at 4:38, and the intro gives a S4x22 CFP Update and describes the Basic Sponsor application process. #icssecurity #otsecurity
